creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Could you expand on the "not working properly" part? Are you trying to
use an input device via Bluetooth?

The Handbook [1] and these pages [2][3] have helped me get my Bluetooth
keyboard working on 9-STABLE.

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/network-bluetooth.html
[2] http://geekinfo.net/article.php?story=20080427222204364
[3] http://astralblue.livejournal.com/357664.html
